content: Hello! How can I help you today?
I don't know your name. As an AI, I don't have access to your personal information or identity unless you choose to share it with me during our conversation.
It's nice to meet you, Adnan! How can I help you today?
I do not have a personal name. I am a large language model, trained by Google.
i have give you a name, so you are name is king
Understood! I will remember that you have named me **King**. How can I help you today, Adnan?
My name is King. How can I help you, Adnan?
